messages.content:
Izzy and Mia's special need school, not a primary location from the animated teen series "Jane", but appears occasionally:

Grade One:
1. Leo (6 years old, autism)
2. Aria (6 years old, blindness)
3. Ethan (6 years old, dyslexia)
4. Mia (5 years old, autism)
5. Avery (6 years old, hearing impairment)
6. Lori (6 years old, physical disability)
7. Mateo (6 years old, ADHD)

Grade Two:
1. Ruby (7 years old, cerebral palsy)
2. Marcus (7 years old, dyspraxia)
3. Sienna (7 years old, intellectual disability)
4. Dylan (7 years old, epilepsy)
5. Frankie (7 years old, Down syndrome, PTSD)
6. Mira (7 years old, selective mutism)
7. Tyler (7 years old, ADHD)

Grade Three:
1. Izzy (8 years old, Down syndrome, ADHD, shaken baby syndrome, cerebral palsy)
2. Leo (8 years old, dyslexia)
3. Kyle (8 years old, physical disability)
4. Sophia (8 years old, hearing impairment)
5. Asher (8 years old, autism, asthma)
6. Miles (8 years old, intellectual disability)
7. Zoe (8 years old, ADHD)

Grade Four:
1. Maggie (9 years old, physical disability)
2. Trevor (9 years old, cerebral palsy)
3. Finn (9 years old, autism)
4. Emilia (9 years old, hearing impairment)
5. Andrea (9 years old, dyslexia)
6. Stella (9 years old, Down syndrome, visual impairment)
7. Andrew (9 years old, ADHD)

Grade Five:
1. Eva (10 years old, intellectual disability, autism)
2. Olivia (10 years old, cerebral palsy)
3. Libby (10 years old, hearing impairment, ADHD)
4. Amelia (10 years old, physical disability, asthma)
5. Lila (10 years old, dyslexia)
6. Isaac (10 years old, PTSD, ADHD)
7. Rachel (10 years old, deafness, vision impairment)

Grade Six:
1. Adeline (11 years old, autism)
2. Molly (11 years old, cerebral palsy)
3. Gianna (11 years old, physical disability)
4. Aaron (11 years old, asthma, PTSD, hearing impairment)
5. Jasper (11 years old, dyslexia)
6. Isabella (11 years old, intellectual disability)
7. Rose (11 years old, ADHD)

Grade Seven:
1. Juliet (12 years old, hearing impairment)
2. Noah (12 years old, cerebral palsy)
3. Avery (12 years old, intellectual disability)
4. Max (12 years old, visual impairment)
5. Chloe (12 years old, autism)
6. Lucas (12 years old, dyslexia)
7. Ada (12 years old, ADHD)

Grade Eight:
1. Eden (13 years old, physical disability)
2. Isaac (13 years old, intellectual disability and hearing impairment)
3. Finn (13 years old, autism)
4. Lucy (13 years old, ADHD)
5. Nadia (13 years old, cerebral palsy)
6. Daniel (13 years old, dyslexia)
7. Gabriela (13 years old, visual impairment)

Grade Nine:
1. Miles (14 years old, cerebral palsy)
2. Lux (14 years old, single-sided deafness, selective mutism, autism, she is a lesbian)
3. Jonah (14 years old, vision impairment)
4. Cara (14 years old, autism)
5. Molly (14 years old, dyslexia)
6. Emiliana (14 years old, intellectual disability)
7. Casper (14 years old, ADHD)

Grade Ten:
1. Sadie (15 years old, autism)
2. Julian (15 years old, cerebral palsy)
3. Layla (15 years old, physical disability)
4. Penny (15 years old, vision impairment)
5. Lily (15 years old, intellectual disability)
6. Olivia (15 years old, dyslexia)
7. Carson (15 years old, ADHD)

Grade Eleven:
1. Noelle (16 years old, hearing impairment)
2. Rue (16 years old, cerebral palsy)
3. Jason (16 years old, physical disability)
4. Susan (16 years old, visual impairment)
5. Nora (16 years old, autism)
6. Fiona (16 years old, intellectual disability)
7. Hailey (16 years old, ADHD)

Grade Twelve:
1. Remy (17 years old, dyslexia)
2. Elodie (17 years old, cerebral palsy)
3. Wyatt (17 years old, physical disability)
4. Gia (17 years old, autism)
5. Alexa (17 years old, ADHD)
6. Leo (18 years old, intellectual disability)
7. Ariana (18 years old, vision impairment)
Note: This list is purely fictional and intended for representation purposes only. It is not based on any real school or students.
Describe the personalities of all the ninth graders

1. Miles - Miles is a friendly and outgoing person. He likes to engage with others and share his ideas. Despite his cerebral palsy, he is determined and active in sports.

2. Lux - Lux is a complex person with a variety of challenges such as being deaf in one ear, selective mutism, and autism. She is quiet but ready to share her thoughts if she feels comfortable. She is also open about being a lesbian and has close relationships with a few trusted friends.

3. Jonah - Jonah is a creative and curious person. He likes to experiment with various art forms and explore the world around him. His vision impairment doesn't stop him from expressing himself.

4. Cara - Cara is often lost in her own world due to her autism. She prefers to keep to herself but appreciates the company of others who share similar interests. She is keenly interested in science and technology.

5. Molly - Molly is a gentle and kind-hearted person with dyslexia. She tries her best to keep up with her schoolwork, but sometimes struggles. She has a passion for music and loves to sing.

6. Emiliana - Emiliana is a cheerful and optimistic person with an intellectual disability. She tries her best to help others and likes to spread happiness wherever she goes.

7. Casper - Casper is a dynamic and energetic student with ADHD. He has an abundance of energy and needs frequent breaks to stay focused. He enjoys activities that keep him active, such as running and playing sports.
Describe the personalities of all the tenth graders

1. Sadie - Sadie is a determined and independent person despite her autism, which can make social situations challenging. She is passionate about animals and has a soft spot for dogs. 

2. Julian - Julian is a patient and observant person with cerebral palsy. He takes his time to analyze situations and often offers thoughtful insights. He enjoys technology and is skilled at programming.

3. Layla - Layla is a strong-willed person with a physical disability. She doesn't let her wheelchair hold her back and is always up for a challenge. She has a great sense of humor and can often make her friends laugh.

4. Penny - Penny is a creative and imaginative person with vision impairment. She uses her art as a way to express her unique perspective on the world. Her favorite medium is sculpting.

5. Lily - Lily is a caring and empathetic person with an intellectual disability. She is a great listener and always tries her best to help others. She has a passion for cooking and loves to bake.

6. Olivia - Olivia is an intelligent and ambitious person with dyslexia. She excels in math and science but sometimes struggles with reading. She is a natural leader and is often called upon to organize group projects.

7. Carson - Carson is a spontaneous and outgoing person with ADHD. He is always looking for new adventures and loves to try new things. He has a passion for music and can often be found playing the guitar or singing.
Describe the personalities of all the twelve graders

1. Remy - Remy is a creative and introspective person with dyslexia. He expresses his thoughts through writing and storytelling, and also has a talent for sketching. He values personal connections and is highly empathetic with others. 

2. Elodie - Elodie is confident and self-assured person in spite of her cerebral palsy. She actively cultivates her independence and is determined to achieve her goals. Her hobbies include photography and playing chess.

3. Wyatt - Wyatt is a well-rounded and outgoing person with physical disability. He has a natural curiosity for science and loves to try out experiments in his free time. Despite his limitations, he is strongly dedicated to his academic studies and wants to pursue engineering in the future.

4. Gia - Gia is a passionate and insightful person with autism. She is a gifted artist and brings her emotions to life in her paintings. She is introspective and seeks to understand human nature better through her paintings.

5. Alexa - Alexa is a driven and outspoken person with ADHD. She has the ability to see from all perspectives and can be quite persuasive when she needs to be. She is deeply concerned about social justice and is involved in student activism in her high school.

6. Leo - Leo is a gentle and kind-hearted person with intellectual disability. He values the importance of honesty and unconditional love. He has a passion for training dogs and volunteers as a dog walker with a local shelter.

7. Ariana - Ariana is a determined and ambitious person despite her vision impairment. She is highly organized and detail-oriented, with an incredible recall ability. She is passionate about languages and has taught herself multiple languages in her free time.
Describe the personalities of all the eleventh graders

1. Noelle - Noelle is a confident and assertive person with hearing impairment. She has a great sense of humor and often makes those around her laugh. She is a natural leader and a skilled mediator.

2. Rue - Rue is a thoughtful and observant person with cerebral palsy. She is acutely aware of her limitations and uses her keen sense of observation to make up for it. She is highly passionate about activism and regularly involves herself in various social causes.

3. Jason - Jason is a hardworking and determined person despite his physical disability. He is passionate about sports, particularly basketball, and has developed a unique set of skills using his wheelchair. He is an enthusiastic participant in community outreach initiatives.

4. Susan - Susan is a patient and serene person with visual impairment. She has a calm disposition and a soothing presence. She is an expert in creative writing and spends her free time writing stories and poems.

5. Nora - Nora is a creative and imaginative person with autism. She has a unique perspective on the world and is highly imaginative. She has created a complex imaginary world for herself and uses it as an escape from reality when needed.

6. Fiona - Fiona is a kind-hearted person with intellectual disability. She is a great listener and is always willing to help others in any way she can. She is passionate about music and sings in the school choir.

7. Hailey - Hailey is a highly energetic and enthusiastic person with ADHD. She is fiercely independent and has a go-getter attitude. She has a passion for journalism and writes engaging articles for the school newspaper.
Describe the personalities of all the first graders

1. Leo - Leo is an intelligent and curious child with autism. He enjoys learning new things and has an excellent memory. He has a strong attention to detail and enjoys developing his own theories.

2. Aria - Aria is a sweet and affectionate child with blindness. She has a strong sense of empathy and loves to connect with other people. She has a great ear for music and enjoys singing and playing instruments.

3. Ethan - Ethan is a creative and active child with dyslexia. He enjoys hands-on activities and projects that engage his imagination. He has a positive attitude and is always eager to try new things.

4. Mia - Mia is an energetic and enthusiastic child with autism. She has a great sense of humor and is always up for a good laugh. She loves to move and dance, and this helps her regulate her emotions.

5. Avery - Avery is a kind-hearted and attentive child with hearing impairment. She is a great listener and takes care to understand others' needs. She has a talent for drawing and often expresses herself through art.

6. Lori - Lori is a determined and resilient child with a physical disability. She has adapted to her challenges and is always willing to try a new way to achieve a task. She has a great sense of humor and is popular with her classmates.

7. Mateo - Mateo is a curious and inquisitive child with ADHD. He loves to ask questions and is always seeking new information. He has lots of energy and enjoys playing sports with his friends.
Describe the personalities of all the second graders

1. Ruby - Ruby is a patient and determined child with cerebral palsy. She is highly creative and has a great imagination. She enjoys telling stories and using her characters to explore various themes.

2. Marcus - Marcus is a sensitive and introspective child with dyspraxia. He enjoys spending time alone and reflecting on his thoughts. He has a love of nature and often spends time outside observing wildlife.

3. Sienna - Sienna is a sociable and friendly child with an intellectual disability. She enjoys spending time with others and making new friends. She has a great sense of humor and loves to tell jokes.

4. Dylan - Dylan is a resilient and determined child with epilepsy. He has a strong work ethic and is always eager to challenge himself. He loves playing the drums and is passionate about music.

5. Frankie - Frankie is a joyful and compassionate child with Down syndrome and PTSD. She loves to make others happy and is always sharing her toys and snacks. She is a hugger and her classmates love to receive her hugs.

6. Mira - Mira is a quiet and thoughtful child with selective mutism. She is highly observant and loves to watch others interact. She has a talent for drawing and often expresses herself through her artwork.

7. Tyler - Tyler is a highly energetic and enthusiastic child with ADHD. He loves to laugh and make others laugh. He has a passion for sports and is always excited to join a game or competition.
Describe the personalities of all the third graders

1. Izzy - Izzy is a creative and imaginative child despite her multiple disabilities including Down Syndrome, ADHD, shaken baby syndrome, and cerebral palsy. She loves to explore new ideas and express herself through art and music. She also has a great sense of humor and loves to make others laugh.

2. Leo - Leo is a determined and hardworking child with dyslexia. He takes pride in his work and always strives to do his best. He has an interest in engineering and loves to build things with his hands.

3. Kyle - Kyle is a passionate and empathetic child with a physical disability. He has a natural sensitivity to others' feelings and is a great listener. He has a love for animals and dreams of becoming a veterinarian.

4. Sophia - Sophia is a friendly and sociable child with hearing impairments. She loves to engage with others and has a great sense of humor. She is an excellent communicator and enjoys learning different modes of communication.

5. Asher - Asher is an enthusiastic and energetic child with autism and asthma. He has a strong interest in science and likes to explore and experiment. He loves playing outdoors and being active.

6. Miles - Miles is a thoughtful and kind-hearted child with an intellectual disability. He is very empathetic and always tries to help others in need. He has a love of animals and enjoys spending his free time outdoors.

7. Zoe - Zoe is a curious and lively child with ADHD. She loves to learn about the world and has a great imagination. She enjoys being creative and expressing herself through her writing and drawing.
Describe the personalities of all the fourth graders

1. Maggie - Maggie is a brave and independent child with a physical disability. She is determined to succeed in everything she does and is unafraid of trying new things. She has a passion for reading and often gets lost in the world of books.

2. Trevor - Trevor is a creative and artistic child with cerebral palsy. He has a great eye for detail and loves to create beautiful artwork. He is a quiet child but has a great sense of humor once you get to know him.

3. Finn - Finn is an imaginative and playful child with autism. He has a wild imagination and loves to create stories. He enjoys playing games and being silly with his friends.

4. Emilia - Emilia is a curious and alert child with a hearing impairment. She is highly observant and has a great memory for details. She loves to explore and ask questions - she is always eager to learn something new.

5. Andrea - Andrea is a determined and resilient child with dyslexia. She is highly motivated to succeed and loves to work hard. She enjoys solving math problems and has an interest in numbers.

6. Stella - Stella is a joyful and outgoing child with Down syndrome and visual impairment. She loves to sing and dance, and is always up for a good time. She has a natural talent for music and has a beautiful singing voice.

7. Andrew - Andrew is an energetic and enthusiastic child with ADHD. He loves to play outside and be active, running and jumping around whenever he can. He has a great imagination and enjoys creating games and playing with his friends.
Describe the personalities of all the fifth graders

1. Eva - Eva is an imaginative and introspective child with an intellectual disability and autism. She has a unique perspective on the world and is highly creative. She loves to draw and is skilled at creating detailed and intricate artwork.

2. Olivia - Olivia is a determined and hardworking child with cerebral palsy. She has a great sense of humor and is always making her friends laugh. She enjoys challenging herself academically and is an excellent problem solver.

3. Libby - Libby is a friendly and outgoing child with hearing impairments and ADHD. She loves to be around people and is always seeking new friendships. She enjoys expressing herself through her art and music.

4. Amelia - Amelia is a sweet and kind-hearted child with a physical disability and asthma. She is highly empathetic and always tries to help others. She is an excellent student and has a great interest in science and nature.

5. Lila - Lila is a compassionate and imaginative child with dyslexia. She has a great talent for storytelling and loves to create imaginative stories. She has a love of animals and enjoys spending time outdoors.

6. Isaac - Isaac is a thoughtful and introspective child with PTSD and ADHD. He is highly observant and often notices details that others miss. He is passionate about social justice and is often involved in community activism.

7. Rachel - Rachel is a highly determined child with deafness and visual impairment. She is very passionate about her studies and works hard to achieve academic success. She has a love of language and enjoys exploring different languages in her free time.
